rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF ANATOLE GEICHE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/23/22. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: The Schedule E attached to the "Declaration of Conservator to Supplement" filed on 10/4/22 amended the Schedule F attached to amendment filed on 7/14/22 and is now missing the names of the stocks held with Ameritrade. (Why do those stocks have no market value or "N/A" as shown on the statement?) The calculation of the bond amount shown in the petition and repeated in the "Declaration" filed on 10/4/22 is incorrect. [CRC 7.207.] If the bondable estate $671,423, the recovery on the bond is 10% of the first $500,000 + 12% of the value above $500,000 up to and including $1,000,000, or a total of $70,570.76: $671,423.00 + $70,570.76 = $741,993.76. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 11/10/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ILENE BRETHOLZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/23/22. (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: No proof of service of notice of the amended distribution filed on 8/9/22 has been filed yet. [CRC 7.53(a).] As previously noted, refunds (or "redeposits") of funds paid or reclaimed during estate administration are not "receipts" includable in the fee base. The $40,000 Administrator withdrew from the estate on 7/12/21 and reimbursed to the estate on 8/2/21 (not the other way around) and the $1,473 Social Security payment reclaimed on 6/5/19 are not includable in the fee base. (On the other hand, as noted previously, gains on sales are includable in the fee base.) The Disbursements schedule must set forth the payee and the description. Likewise, also as previously noted, the amounts owed to the administrator shown on Schedule F (Liabilities) must clearly indicate the ORIGINAL PAYEE of each payment. The Probate Referee commission of $14.89 for the Partial No. 6 I&A filed on 8/6/21 is not reflected in the accounting. Attorney fees and costs shown on Schedule C (Disbursements) must be itemized: $229.25 on 2/9/21; $103.49 on 3/4/22; $246.78 on 6/10/21; and $109.60 on 3/18/22. The $1,000 "retainer" paid by the administrator on 12/4/19, prior to appointment, must be deducted from the attorney's statutory fee. Please file the receipt for the sale of the jewelry. The total of the I&As is slightly off The Summary of Account on page 4 of the amended petition is incorrect. The disclosure regarding Probate Code Sect. 1064(a)(5) in paragraph 33 (p. 8 of the amended petition) appears to be incorrect, as interest is reflected in the accounting; however, it is noted that the funds held at Chase exceed the FDIC amount. (Transfer of cash between accounts is not a change in the form of assets. [Probate Code Sect. 1063(b).]) (The Probate Examiner's office is not an interested party entitled to notice.) A courtesy copy of an amendment to this amended petition and of the proof of service of the notice of the Amended Distribution Calculation and the amendment to the amended petition (and any other papers filed in the meantime) must be received by the assigned examiner by no later than 11/10/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF GUSTAVO P. SERAFIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/16/22. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: The addresses of the parties entitled to notice were not set forth in the petition to confirm that notice was properly served. Please explain the $6,179.74 "balance of non-inventoried account" at Fidelity Investments shown as a receipt on 12/3/20. Why was no I&A filed for this? The original statement must be filed to verify the amount. Why was there a burial fee paid to Holy Cross Cemetery for "O. Kindel" on 12/1/20? It would be helpful if the attendant care disbursements showed the period covered by each payment. For example, there were two payments on 1/11/21. For what dates were those amounts paid? There were also five payments made post-death on 6/10/21 and 8/12/21 without any explanation. The $72.50 "OOP Expense" (out of pocket?) reimbursed to the conservator on 11/2/21 does not appear to be supported by her Table 4. Expense Details (which did not show subtotals). This Court has never allowed reimbursement for parking. Please clarify the two reimbursements to the attorney on 7/21/21: $113 for Affidavit of Death; and $95 for "Letters". The Court's register of actions does not reflect any Letters issued on or around 7/21/21. For what dates was a $103 safebox rental paid on 9/13/21? Was this a bank safe deposit box the conservatee had? Please explain the attorney's time entry on 12/3/20; the register of actions does not seem to indicate any ex parte hearing on that date. The conservator is the administrator of his estate. She will presumably be filing tax returns and resolving tax issues as the administrator. After these issues are addressed, an appearance will likely be required for the Court to determine if additional fees to the conservator and the attorney should be approved. (The conservator was authorized to pay herself fees on account up to $1,240/month, not $1,280.) Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 11/7/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. It has been more than two years since the decedent died in 2019. No first interim account has been filed or waived by the beneficiaries. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PETER CRAIG ROBERTS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/23/22. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: Due to a dearth of court clerks, the amended petition, while file stamped 9/20/22, was not actually e-filed until 9/27/22, when it first became available for viewing. Notice is defective if mailed or published before the filing of the pleading requiring notice. (Furthermore, the proof of publication indicates that notice was published on dates before the amended petition was either filed or e-filed.) Mailed and published notice must also clearly indicate that and AMENDED petition has been filed, not that the notice itself is amended. The Waiver of Bond attached to this amended petition does not indicate the NAME of the proposed personal representative in item 4. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 11/10/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOSEPH E. SU
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/21/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) Must file judicial council form DE-147 Duties and Liabilities. 2) Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed with a cover page, separately, and confidentially. Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form.[LRSF 14.18 E.] 3) Notice must be re-done and include the required language found in Local Rule 14.1 D. 6) 4) If it appears that property will pass to a citizen of a foreign country, notice shall be given to a recognized diplomatic or consular official of the foreign country maintaining an office in the United States. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 11/07/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]
